headlines.title: Trump attends dignified transfer of U.S. troops
headlines.description: The President was at Dover Air Force Base in Delaware today for the dignified transfer of four military personnel killed in recent days in the Middle East as attacks between the U.S. and Iran have escalated. One of the families of the fallen then flew home to Georgia aboard Air Force One with President Trump. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Send your questions for Richard Engel on the war with Iran and more
headlines.description: The United States is about to enter its fifth month of war with Iran, and NBC News’ chief foreign correspondent Richard Engel has been covering all the developments.

headlines.title: Video shows Madison police shoot and kill man who allegedly was armed with a knife
headlines.description: Madison, Wisconsin, police fatally shot a man that they say was armed with a knife after a report of someone "checking parked vehicles" authorities said. NBC News' Maggie Vespa reports.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall
headlines.description: As the center of Tropical Storm Bertha churns over Southeast Louisiana, the storm is packing a punch. NBC News’ George Solis has the new images now coming in.

headlines.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
headlines.description: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.

headlines.title: We want to hear how Medicaid work requirements are affecting you
headlines.description: If you have lost your health coverage or are at risk of losing it, tell us your story.

headlines.title: Trump imposes 50% tariffs on dairy, alcohol, and cars from Canada
headlines.description: The Trump administration imposed 50% tariffs on three categories of imports from Canada, dairy, alcohol, and cars, citing discriminatory actions. NBC News' Monica Alba reports on how Trump is also considering additional tariffs due to the Canadian wildfires.

headlines.title: Wisconsin officer kills man armed with knife, police say, as shooting sparks protests
headlines.description: Madison police said that after a chase and a struggle, a man who was being sought pulled out a knife and injured an officer, which led to the deadly shooting.

headlines.title: ‘Off the charts’: Secret Service describes rising threats to protectees
headlines.description: Despite the heightened environment, the Secret Service says it’s confident in plans for the rescheduled White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

headlines.title: 14 years after woman was stabbed 100 times, her close friend was arrested in the cold case
headlines.description: Investigative genetic genealogy helped identify Mayra Velasquez, 42, as the suspect in Irasema Chavez’s 2012 stabbing death in the Arlington cold case.

headlines.title: Redistricting pushes incumbents toward the exits: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we dive into the still-growing number of lawmaker retirements this election cycle.

headlines.title: Trump hypes Mike Collins’ Senate campaign at Georgia rally
headlines.description: GOP Rep. Mike Collins is taking on Sen. Jon Ossoff, a well-funded Democrat, in a key battleground race.
